LSE-MS7-L4-1400P-MSELA7-AGS-LAT-02 • MS ELA Grade 7 • Central Ideas in Informational Text

The Bilingual Buzzer

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What are the students mainly discussing?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete academic justification. State your claim about why the girl objects to translating the clues, support that claim with reasoning drawn directly from what she says, and articulate the conclusion that follows about what translating would do to the game.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  CCSS RI.7.2  |  MS ELA Grade 7: Central Ideas in Informational Text
